# Rohit Raj — Founding Engineer & AI Systems Architect

> Backend engineer with 6+ years experience building production AI systems, distributed architectures, and mobile apps for startups. Based in India, available worldwide.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://rohitraj.tech/en): Portfolio overview with AI projects and reliability engineering
- [About](https://rohitraj.tech/en/about): Background and experience
- [Projects](https://rohitraj.tech/en/projects): Full project catalog with architecture details
- [AI Agents](https://rohitraj.tech/en/agents): Live, autonomous AI agents you can try in the browser
- [Services](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services): Engineering services offered
- [Engineering Notes](https://rohitraj.tech/en/notes): 78 technical case-study posts

## Featured Projects

- [Resolvr — Self-Hosted AI Customer Support Agent](https://rohitraj.tech/en/agents/resolvr): Open-source, self-hosted AI customer support agent that runs on local Ollama. Classifies a ticket, retrieves KB articles via RAG, decides resolve-vs-escalate behind a safety gate, and drafts a reply — customer data never leaves your server, zero per-token cost. Stack: FastAPI + React. Code: https://github.com/rohitguta2432/resolvr
- [MicroItinerary](https://rohitraj.tech/en/projects/microitinerary): AI travel planner with GPT-4 destination recommendations
- [StellarMIND](https://rohitraj.tech/en/projects/stellarmind): Chat-to-SQL with pgvector and Spring AI MCP server
- [MyFinancial](https://rohitraj.tech/en/projects/myfinancial): Privacy-first personal finance advisor PWA

## Services

- [6-Week MVP Sprint](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/6-week-mvp): Fixed-scope, fixed-price MVP sprint for pre-seed founders, $15K-$30K, 6 weeks to production
- [Hire a Founding Engineer in India](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/hire-founding-engineer-india): Senior India-based founding engineer for hire — sprint or retainer, no equity, full GitHub
- [Hire a Fractional CTO in India](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/hire-fractional-cto-india): Honest scoping for whether you actually need a fractional CTO or a builder
- [Startup MVP Development](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/startup-mvp-development): Idea-to-production MVP development for under $10K
- [Full-Stack Development & AI Integration](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/full-stack-development): Spring Boot + React/Next.js + AI integration for startups
- [Mobile App Development](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/mobile-app-development): React Native + Expo, Play Store + App Store
- [AI Chatbot Development](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/ai-chatbot-development): WhatsApp + LLM-powered chatbots for Indian businesses
- [Fintech App Development](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/fintech-app-development): Secure financial apps with payments, dashboards, offline support
- [Healthcare Clinic App](https://rohitraj.tech/en/services/healthcare-clinic-app): WhatsApp booking bots and clinic management

## Expertise

- Agentic AI Development
- Custom Text-to-SQL Systems (RAG + pgvector)
- Enterprise Java Architecture (Spring Boot 3.x, Java 21)
- Mobile App Development (React Native, Kotlin, Jetpack Compose)
- Distributed Systems (Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL)
- WhatsApp Business API Integration
- On-Device AI (Gemma, LiteRT, offline-first architectures)
